Stop.windows: $changed = git status --porcelain -- src tests Directory.Build.props global.json; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit 0 }; if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace(($changed -join ''))) { Write-Output 'dotnet-quality-skip: no src/tests changes'; exit 0 }; dotnet build STRIDE.slnx -v minimal; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; dotnet test STRIDE.slnx --no-build -v minimal; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }
Stop.linux: CHANGED="$(git status --porcelain -- src tests Directory.Build.props global.json 2>/dev/null)"; if [ -z "$CHANGED" ]; then echo 'dotnet-quality-skip: no src/tests changes'; exit 0; fi; dotnet build STRIDE.slnx -v minimal && dotnet test STRIDE.slnx --no-build -v minimal
Stop.osx: CHANGED="$(git status --porcelain -- src tests Directory.Build.props global.json 2>/dev/null)"; if [ -z "$CHANGED" ]; then echo 'dotnet-quality-skip: no src/tests changes'; exit 0; fi; dotnet build STRIDE.slnx -v minimal && dotnet test STRIDE.slnx --no-build -v minimal
